issue.title: Wrong code at -O1 and above on x86_64-linux_gnu since f12a556
issue.author: shao-hua-li

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Reduced:
```
@b = external global [72 x i32]
@c = external global i32

define i64 @test(i64 %a) {
  %mul = select i1 icmp ne (ptr getelementptr inbounds ([72 x i32], ptr @b, i64 0, i64 25), ptr @c), i64 %a, i64 0
  %conv3 = zext i1 icmp ne (ptr getelementptr inbounds ([72 x i32], ptr @b, i64 0, i64 25), ptr @c) to i64
  %add = add nsw i64 %mul, %conv3
  ret i64 %add
}
```
Folds to:
```
define i64 @test(i64 %a) {
  %1 = add i64 %a, -1
  %add = select i1 icmp ne (ptr getelementptr inbounds ([72 x i32], ptr @b, i64 0, i64 25), ptr @c), i64 %1, i64 0
  ret i64 %add
}
```
The -1 should be 1.

This is due to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/blob/d7fcb5b6b5280dc61d5afe0920bb78a82cfe2f27/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstructionCombining.cpp#L911 Constant expressions strike again!

comments.author: nikic
comments.body:
Looks like this is also on the release branch.

/cherry-pick c15ccfb24afa67d3c3f54e52cc1d1afa564715ed
